pr.title: feat: reservation grid on club detail page
pr.body:
Adds an interactive time × resource reservation grid to the club detail page, inspired by schedulemyop.com. Rows are the user's local-timezone time blocks; columns are active resources. Empty future slots show an "open" button; occupied slots show the owner's callsign (falling back to display name). Includes prev/next day navigation.

## Backend

- **New migration** `20260524000001_list_club_reservations.sql`: SECURITY DEFINER RPC `list_club_reservations(p_club_id, p_from, p_to)` that bypasses the existing member-only RLS on `reservations` (which restricts rows to one's own) and returns all active reservations for a club's resources in the time window, joined with each owner's `callsign`/`display_name`. Requires approved club membership.

## Frontend

- **`ReservationGridComponent`** (`club-detail/reservation-grid/`): standalone, signal-based table component.
  - Row interval = minimum `block_size_minutes` across the club's active resources (so all resources have valid slots per row).
  - Slot times and the date label are displayed in the user's local timezone; the time column header shows the short timezone abbreviation (e.g. `MDT`, `EST`) via `Intl.DateTimeFormat`.
  - Cells: "open" button for future, block-aligned, unreserved slots; callsign chip for taken slots; greyed/no-op for past or misaligned slots.
  - Emits `slotClick` with `{resourceId, startsAt, endsAt}`; reservation creation and grid refresh handled by the parent.

- **`ClubDetailPage`** gains:
  - `selectedDate` signal (local midnight, default today) with `prevDay()`/`nextDay()` navigation that flips at local midnight.
  - `loadReservations()` queries the backend using the local day's UTC boundaries and is called on init and after each date change or reservation creation.
  - `onSlotClick()` calls `createReservation` RPC and refreshes.

- **`ClubService`** gains `listClubReservations(clubId, from, to)` and `createReservation(resourceId, startsAt, endsAt)`.
pr.author: Copilot
